title: stipa neomexicana
intro: Stipa neomexicana, also known as New Mexico needle grass, is a species of grass that is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stipa neomexicana include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Stipa neomexicana can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine.
